name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior or interface you want.

## Why It Helps

Explain the expected benefit for users, maintainers, or workflows.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add links, examples, or related issues here.
